name: Jabal Omar Development Company
summary: Jabal Omar Development Company operates as a real estate development company in Saudi Arabia. The company operates through Operating Hotels, Commercial Centers, and Properties for Development and Sale segments. It engages in the investment, development, management, and sale of plots in the Jabal Omar project located in Makkah. It is also involved in the construction, maintenance, management, demolishing, surveying, furnishing hotels, commercial facilities, and staff residences, as well as operation of hotels. In addition, the company engages in importing and exporting hotel equipment and furniture. Jabal Omar Development Company operates hotels, including the Marriott, a five-star hotel with 426 rooms and suites; the Hilton Suites, a five-star hotel with 484 suites; the Hyatt Regency, a five-star hotel with 657 rooms and suites; and the Conrad, a five-star hotel with 438 rooms and suites; and Jabal Omar DoubleTree by Hilton with 676 rooms and suites. It also develops residential projects; and a commercial center. Further, the company provides logistic services. Jabal Omar Development Company was founded in 2006 and is based in Mecca, Saudi Arabia.
